channel.title: iDigital
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from iDigital, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: This startup claims it can stop lightning and prevent catastrophic wildfires
item.description: On June 1, 2023, as a sweltering heat wave baked Quebec, thousands of lightning strikes flashed across the province, setting off more than 120 wildfir...

item.title: BMW piloting Hexagonâs wheeled humanoid in Germany
item.description: BMW launched an initial test deployment of Hexagon's AEON humanoid at its Group Plant Leipzig in December 2025 The post BMW piloting Hexagonâs wheeled...

item.title: 6 lessons I learned watching a robotics startup die from the inside
item.description: After a year as COO of K-Scale Labs, Rui Xu reflects on the hard lessons behind the collapse of its low-cost humanoid robot ambitions â from overrelia...

item.title: Intuitive buys European surgical robot distributors
item.description: Intuitive said more than 470 da Vinci surgical robots were installed in Italy, Spain and Portugal as of Dec. 31, 2025. The post Intuitive buys Europea...

item.title: 2026 Robotics Summit early bird registration ends today
item.description: The Robotics Summit features a world-class agenda with speakers from Aethon, Agility Robotics, ASTM International, AWS, Boston Dynamics, Brightpick, C...

item.title: The Download: protesting AI, and whatâs floating in space
item.description: This is todayâs edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of whatâs going on in the world of technology. I checked ou...

item.title: NORD adds 112 frame size to IE5+ synchronous motor line
item.description: NORD offers IE5+ motors in sizes 71, 90, and newly released, size 112, extending the power range from 0.5 to 15.0 hp. The post NORD adds 112 frame siz...

item.title: OpenAIâs âcompromiseâ with the Pentagon is what Anthropic feared
item.description: On February 28, OpenAI announced it had reached a deal that will allow the US military to use its technologies in classified settings. CEO Sam Altman ...

item.title: I checked out one of the biggest anti-AI protests yet
item.description: Pull the plug! Pull the plug! Stop the slop! Stop the slop! For a few hours this Saturday, February 28, I watched as a couple of hundred anti-AI prote...

item.title: MIT Technology Review is a 2026 ASME finalist in reporting
item.description: The American Society of Magazine Editors has named MIT Technology Review as a finalist for a 2026 National Magazine Award in the reporting category. T...

item.title: Railway secures $100 million to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure
item.description: Railway , a San Francisco-based cloud platform that has quietly amassed two million developers without spending a dollar on marketing, announced Thurs...

item.title: Claude Code costs up to $200 a month. Goose does the same thing for free.
item.description: The artificial intelligence coding revolution comes with a catch: it's expensive. Claude Code , Anthropic's terminal-based AI agent that can write, de...

item.title: Listen Labs raises $69M after viral billboard hiring stunt to scale AI customer interviews
item.description: Alfred Wahlforss was running out of options. His startup, Listen Labs , needed to hire over 100 engineers, but competing against Mark Zuckerberg's $10...

item.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
item.description: Salesforce on Tuesday launched an entirely rebuilt version of Slackbot , the company's workplace assistant, transforming it from a simple notification...

item.title: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files â no coding required
item.description: Anthropic released Cowork on Monday, a new AI agent capability that extends the power of its wildly successful Claude Code tool to non-technical users...

item.title: Advance Trustworthy AI and ML, and Identify Best Practices for Scaling AI
item.description: By John P. Desmond, AI Trends Editor Advancing trustworthy AI and machine learning to mitigate agency risk is a priority for the US Department of Ener...

item.title: Best Practices for Building the AI Development Platform in Government

item.title: Predictive Maintenance Proving Out as Successful AI Use Case

item.title: Novelty In The Game Of Go Provides Bright Insights For AI And Autonomous Vehicles
item.description: By Lance Eliot, the AI Trends Insider We already expect that humans to exhibit flashes of brilliance. It might not happen all the time, but the act it...
